installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.24.0 --activate && pnpm install
ignoreCommand: if [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" = "manifest-.3" ]; then exit 1; fi; git diff --quiet HEAD~1 HEAD -- apps/ packages/ || exit 0

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://js.stripe.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://us.i.posthog.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://img.clerk.com https://assets.basehub.com https://*.stripe.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.clerk.com https://*.supabase.co https://api.posthog.com https://us.i.posthog.com https://*.sentry.io https://*.stripe.com wss://*.clerk.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://*.clerk.com
